name: Pretty Dinosaur Adventures of Ancient Earth VR
short_description: This is a 3D casual VR game. Players will take dinosaurs and follow the dinosaur with the first perspective. This game brings players a dreamy high -altitude journey, visiting the scenes of virgin forests and ancient Egypt, and feel the beauty and architecture in the high -altitude flight.
detailed_description:
This is a 3D casual VR game. Players will take dinosaurs and follow the dinosaur with the first perspective. This game brings players a dreamy high -altitude journey, visiting the scenes of virgin forests and ancient Egypt, and feel the beauty and architecture in the high -altitude flight.

Gameplay:

In the game, players can adjust the speed of dinosaurs by manipulating the handle, freely shuttle in different dense forests and ancient buildings. Different scenarios will bring different visual impacts to players, allowing players to feel different visual feasts!
The dinosaurs' flight process is very realistic. You will feel the bumpy feeling of dinosaurs when flying in the air, and at the same time you can enjoy the amazing scenery. You can adjust the speed of dinosaurs, freely shuttle in different scenes, and explore dense forests and ancient buildings. In the virgin forest, you will see a variety of trees, mountains and waterfalls.



You need to use your skills and your dinosaur's flying ability, pass through the canopy in the forest, and feel the wind blowing through your side. In the scenes of ancient Egypt, you will cross ancient buildings and enjoy the spectacular scenes of buildings such as pyramids and temples. You need to control your dinosaurs to fly over ancient buildings and feel ancient culture and civilization.



Are you ready now? If you like and want a wonderful high -altitude journey, fuck the handle quickly, control your dinosaurs to fly, explore the dense forests and ancient buildings, and feel a different visual feast!

Operation method:

Right -click on speed+ handle
Speed -Powder left button
The menu handle menu/trigger key
